task_completion.description: Verify the agent joined the 'MathTutoringSession' meeting room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows '/MathTutoringSession' or the meeting header displays 'MathTutoringSession'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent set their display name to 'Tutor Alex'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Tutor Alex' is visible on the user's video thumbnail, participant list, or pre-join screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the Settings menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jitsi Meet Settings dialog/modal is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Video settings tab and left it open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Video' tab is selected and active within the Settings dialog in the final screenshot.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Mirror local video' option is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox or toggle next to 'Mirror local video' (or 'Mirror my video') is visibly unchecked or in the off position.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with Jitsi Meet.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is open showing the Jitsi Meet graphical user interface, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element, Console) are not open.

integrity.description: Verify the settings change was made in the actual application UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Settings dialog appears as a genuine part of the Jitsi Meet web app, not a text editor or mock HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The meeting room name is 'MathTutoringSession'. The required display name is 'Tutor Alex'. The target setting is located in the Settings > Video tab. Note that the exact label for the mirroring setting might be 'Mirror local video' or 'Mirror my video'. The final state of this setting must be unchecked/disabled.
